readings.summary: With the staff of God, Moses helps Israel defeat Amalek.

readings.citation:
Ps 121:1-2, 3-4, 5-6, 7-8, R. see v.2
Our help is from the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 121:1-2, 3-4, 5-6, 7-8, R. see v.2
Our help is from the Lord, who made heaven and earth.

readings.summary: All scripture is inspired by God.

The word of God is living and effective,
discerning reflections and thoughts of the heart.
The widow and the irreligious judge.

antiphons.text:
Behold, the eyes of the Lord are on those who fear him,
who hope in his merciful love, to rescue their souls from death,
to keep them alive in famine.

The Son of Man has come
to give his life as a ransom for many.
